meta.description: Countdown to your special moment. Create and share countdowns for trips, weddings, graduations and much more.
meta.ogTitle: Momentto — Countdown to your special moment
meta.ogDescription: Create and share countdowns for trips, weddings, graduations and much more.

home.tagline: Every special moment deserves to be eagerly awaited.
home.sub: Create your countdown and feel the anticipation build with every second.
home.footer: Trips · Weddings · Graduations · Parties · and much more

setup.title: Countdown
setup.step1Sub: Choose the reason for your countdown
setup.step2Sub: Tell us more about this special moment

list.title: My countdowns
list.savedEmptyDescription: Save countdowns from friends to follow them here. Visit a share link and tap Save.
list.linkRevoked: A shared countdown was removed (link revoked)

share.title: Share countdown
share.expiry: Link expires 5 days after the event date.
share.publicView: Anyone with this link can follow the countdown, without editing.
share.fallbackDescription: This share link does not exist or has expired.
share.revokeDescription: Anyone with this link will lose access immediately.

offline.offline: You're offline. Changes will be saved when you reconnect.

install.prompt: To receive notifications on iOS, install the app: tap

push.notSupported: Notifications not supported in this browser

changelog.description: All the latest updates and improvements to Momentto.
changelog.metaDescription: All the updates and improvements to Momentto

auth.headline: Sync your countdowns
auth.sub: Sign in to access your events from any device.
auth.checkInboxSub: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Click it to sign in.

hero.tagline: Every special moment deserves to be eagerly awaited.
hero.sub: Create beautiful countdowns for your trips, weddings, graduations and everything that makes life worth celebrating.

features.title: Everything you need to count down to what matters

item0.title: Any occasion
item0.description: Trips, weddings, graduations, parties, babies — if it deserves anticipation, Momentto has a category for it.

item1.title: Share with anyone
item1.description: Generate a public link and let your friends and family follow the countdown in real time.

item2.title: Stay notified
item2.description: Enable push notifications and never miss the moment — get an alert right when your event arrives.

item3.title: Works offline
item3.description: Installed as a PWA, Momentto works even without an internet connection. Your countdowns are always available.

step0.title: Pick a category
step0.description: Choose from trips, weddings, graduations, parties and many more.

step1.title: Set the date
step1.description: Enter your event name and the exact date — time is optional.

step2.title: Watch and share
step2.description: Your live countdown is ready. Share it with a link or install the app on your home screen.

cta.title: Ready to start counting?
cta.sub: Join thousands of people celebrating their next big moment.
